name: synapse-mcp
description: Local-first multi-agent coordination + shared memory MCP server (node:sqlite WAL, event-sourced).

scripts.test: tsc && node --import tsx --test tests/test-store.test.ts && node --import tsx tests/error-edge.test.ts && node --import tsx tests/crash-recovery.test.ts && node tests/multi-agent-coord.mjs && node tests/watcher-realtime.mjs && node tests/watcher-tick-builtin.mjs && node tests/fts5-bm25-recall.mjs && node tests/concurrent-write-integrity.mjs && node tests/cold-start-concurrent.mjs
